summary: Environment variable or PATH differences are the most common cause of works-locally failures
problem: Code works in one shell or machine but fails in another with no obvious code difference
solution: Print env vars at the point of failure: check NODE_ENV, PATH, and any service URLs. Use `printenv | grep <prefix>` to surface hidden mismatches between environments
root_cause: Shell profiles, .env files, and IDE terminals each load different environment contexts; what is set in one is invisible to another
